title: salvia lavandulifolia subsp. mariolensis
intro: Salvia lavandulifolia subsp. mariolensis, also known as Mariola Sage, is a plant species in the Salvia genus, characterized by its unique properties and medicinal value. This plant is valued for its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate various health issues. The health benefits of Mariola Sage include relief from respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety levels. Herbal preparations of Mariola Sage can be found in tea, tincture, and essential oil forms, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
